records.title: Add note on Azure Spot node pools for stateful workloads
records.summary: Guidance added clarifying that Azure Spot node pools are not recommended for stateful workloads due to eviction behavior.

records.title: Enhance documentation for AKS private cluster FQDN
records.summary: Expanded explanation of private cluster FQDN resolution options and custom DNS configuration.

records.title: Node auto-repair notifications (preview)
records.summary: New page documenting preview support for node auto-repair event notifications via Azure Event Grid.

records.title: AKS Automatic reaches general availability in more regions
records.summary: Region availability table updated marking AKS Automatic as generally available in six additional regions.

records.title: GPU VM size retirement notice for NC-series v2
records.summary: Added retirement notice: NC-series v2 GPU node pools will be unsupported after August 2026; migration guidance linked.
